description: Taking traditional designs and giving them a modern twist is what makes ice watches irresistible timepieces. The Sili wrist watch is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece, with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 36 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty:2 Years Solid plastic case with fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Ice logo on the 12 hour mark Date aperture at the 3 hour mark Pink silicone strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort Press to reset time and alarm Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
